title: Let It Be
why_this_song: Let It Be by The Beatles (1970) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Let it be, let it be
Let it be, let it be
Whisper words of wisdom, let it be
Let it be, yeah, let it be
Oh, there will be an answer, let it be
Let it be, let it be
Let it be, yeah, let it be

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "words" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "words" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wisdom" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wisdom" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When I find myself in times of trouble
There will be an answer, let it be
And when the night is cloudy

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Let it be, let it be
I wake up to the sound of music

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Let It Be" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Let It Be"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Beatles one question about "Let It Be", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Beatles sobre "Let It Be", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Let It Be" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Let It Be" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Let It Be", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Let It Be", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Let It Be" was released in 1970. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Let It Be" foi lançada em 1970. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
